channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Practical Enterprise AI Came Of Age At The 2026 World Economic Forum
item.description: This year in Davos, executives from the tech world and beyond focused on the most relevant use cases of AI for solving real-world business problems.

item.title: Exclusive: Binance fires top investigators who claim to have uncovered evidence of Iranian sanctions violations
item.description: Internal findings by the fired investigators reviewed by Fortune pointed to over $1 billion in Tether flowing through Binance to Iran-linked wallets.

item.title: 90% Cheaper AI? Microsoft-Backed Chip Startup Says It’s Possible Today
item.description: AI is expensive. This Microsoft-backed chip startup says its can generate AI answers 90% cheaper ... and it's going to get even better over time ...

item.title: New York Fed economists confirm that Americans are the ones footing the bill for 90% of Trump’s tariffs
item.description: The president has insisted other countries are paying for his import taxes. American companies and consumers are telling a different story.

item.title: Exclusive: The Walton family-funded PE firm that owns Rapha Cycling Club presses pause on all new investments
item.description: RZC Investments, the private equity firm of Walmart heirs Tom and Steuart Walton, said it was still “actively” managing its current portfolio.

item.title: Inflation eased slightly in January but remained well above the Fed's target
item.description: The Labor Department on Friday released the January 2026 consumer price index (CPI), which showed that inflation remained elevated above the Federal R...

item.title: Call Doctors Physicians, Not “Providers,” Specialty Group Says
item.description: A new ACP policy paper says physicians should not be called providers. The term undermines professionalism, ethics, and trust, according to ACP.

item.title: Analog-obsessed Gen Zers are buying $40 app blockers to limit their social media use and take a break from the ‘slot machine in your pocket’
item.description: App-blocking devices like Bloom and Brick promise to improve focus and decrease compulsive phone checks by making social media harder to access.

item.title: What To Watch This Weekend: New Shows And Movies To Stream On Netflix, Hulu, Prime Video, Apple TV And More
item.description: Looking for something new to stream this weekend? Here’s every major new movie and show hitting Netflix, Hulu, Prime Video, Apple TV and more.

item.title: Top analyst warns the economy is figuring out how to grow without creating new jobs, leaving a major vulnerability
item.description: The economy will grow because of higher productivity, aided in part by AI, says Michael Pearce of Oxford Economics. But people aren't core to that sto...

item.title: SpaceX launches crew to International Space Station after prior team's medical evacuation
item.description: SpaceX and NASA launched a new crew to the International Space Station on Friday, around one month after a previous crew had to be brought home early.

item.title: Gas prices fall in January, giving Americans a break at the pump
item.description: Gas prices dropped 7.5% over the past year, bringing welcome relief to American consumers as inflation data shows energy costs declining nationwide.

item.title: CrowdStrike And NordVPN Aim To Make Every Consumer Their Own CISO
item.description: NordVPN taps CrowdStrike threat intelligence to power its Threat Protection Pro feature, bringing enterprise-grade adversary tracking to millions of e...

item.title: Stocks up in final hour after inflation data, but still set for down week — live
A partial government shutdown looms. The TSA has warnings for travelers.
Nasdaq ends lower, Dow and S&P 500 eke out gains as U.S. stocks cap off bad week
Dow moving farther from 50,000 mark as stocks lack direction after CPI report
Tesla rival Rivian’s stock is up more than 20% early Friday
Gun accessory maker to pay $1.75M to Buffalo mass shooting victims’ families
item.description: A Georgia gun accessory maker will pay $1.75 million to victims' families of the 2022 Buffalo mass shooting and halt New York sales of its MA Lock dev...

item.title: Mortgage rates edge lower, hover near 6%
item.description: The average rate on a 30-year fixed mortgage slipped this week to 6.09%, according to the latest Freddie Mac data released Thursday. That is down from...

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
